scripts.build:wasm: cargo build -p wasm-api --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && mkdir -p public && install -m 0644 ../../target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/wasm_api.wasm public/wasm_api.wasm
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && tsc --noEmit && vite build
scripts.smoke:e2e: npm run build && node e2e/shell.smoke.mjs && node e2e/a11y-noleak.smoke.mjs && node e2e/three-marks.smoke.mjs && node e2e/column-four.smoke.mjs
